name: Short-fiction markets
description: Literary magazines currently open for short-story submissions — where can I send a story right now?
bottom_line: As of 2026-07-09: 5 of 8 markets are open. Clarkesworld ($0.14/word, up to 22k words) and The Sun ($300-$1,500, simultaneous OK) take submissions year-round; Apex ($0.08/word) closes with July; Ploughshares runs through Nov 15; Escape Pod is open only via a themed special window. Strange Horizons and One Story expect to reopen in the fall; Uncanny is closed indefinitely. Best paying open door: Clarkesworld. Only open door that allows simultaneous submissions to other magazines: The Sun (and Escape Pod, within its theme).
